channel.title: e-readers on Grapefruitmoon.net
channel.description: Recent content in e-readers on Grapefruitmoon.net

item.title: Kindling
item.description: So Amazon announced their new Kindle range this week, which included the new Android-based tablet, the Kindle Fire. I really like the current Kindle device, but I’m not sure how I feel about the new products yet. It seems a touch half-baked to me, and there are some design decisions I really don’t understand. iPad Competitor In the non-techie media there has been much talk of how the Fire is a competitor to the iPad.
